## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Admin UI
- [ ] Windows launcher / packaging
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior

## Review boundary

- [ ] Codex or the user remains the final reviewer before merge.
- [ ] MiMo Code is not allowed to merge its own Worktree.
- [ ] Bounded task and Git Worktree isolation assumptions are preserved.
- [ ] Localhost-only daemon assumptions are preserved.

## Testing

Describe what you ran, or why tests were not run.

```text
Tests not run; documentation-only change.
```

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, credentials, full private logs, or personal paths are included.
- [ ] Screenshots and logs are redacted.
- [ ] Generated artifacts are not committed unless the PR explicitly discusses them.
